summary: 执行时钟树优化后处理流程
description: 该命令用于执行时钟树综合（CTS）后的优化处理流程。它提供了一系列可选的开关，用于启用或禁用特定的优化步骤，例如平均插入延迟减少、单元尺寸缩减、设计规则违反（DRV）修复、通过重新缓冲进行修复、布局细化、ECO布线以及时钟偏差修复等。用户可以根据设计需求选择性地启用这些功能。
usage: ccopt_pro [-help] [-enable_average_id_reduction {true false}] [-enable_downsizing_pass {true false}] [-enable_drv_fixing {true false}] [-enable_drv_fixing_by_rebuffering {true false}] [-enable_refine_place {true false}] [-enable_routing_eco {true false}] [-enable_skew_fixing {true false}] [-enable_skew_fixing_by_rebuffering {true false}]

options.name: -help
options.description: 打印此命令的使用说明

options.name: -enable_average_id_reduction
options.description: 启用/禁用平均插入延迟减少

options.name: -enable_downsizing_pass
options.description: 启用/禁用全局单元尺寸缩减步骤

options.name: -enable_drv_fixing
options.description: 启用/禁用设计规则违反（DRV）修复

options.name: -enable_drv_fixing_by_rebuffering
options.description: 启用/禁用通过重新缓冲进行设计规则违反（DRV）修复

options.name: -enable_refine_place
options.description: 启用/禁用设计的布局细化。可能导致单元重叠

options.name: -enable_skew_fixing
options.description: 启用/禁用时钟树偏差修复

options.name: -enable_skew_fixing_by_rebuffering
options.description: 启用/禁用通过重新缓冲进行时钟树偏差修复
